summaries.login:forobohd-orients: Broad firmware and embedded systems work spanning flight control, optical flow integration, and build/deployment tooling. Flight control contributions include failsafe improvements (voltage failsafe, failsafe logic overhaul), position hold fixes, azimuth-hold descend, manual max angle correction, and a tunnel mode (with a revert). Optical flow was integrated as a separate process. On the pendrive/deployment side: pendrive bundle checksum, disabling bundle generation, obfuscation fixes, and build fixes. An intermediate persistent storage layer was added (atp-1553/1552/1581), along with RAM refresh logic (reverted). Logging improvements and tracker stop handling were also included. Separately, ground station provisioning work bootstrapped a new update-center-api repo with registration endpoints, an X25519 security protocol, a Config Editor screen for editing default.toml, and a Settings/Update Center registration screen with keypair storage as plaintext base64. ArduPilot presets were updated with a servo function addition.
summaries.login:nadiia-khasyshyn: Focused on computer vision, detection pipeline, and UAV system reliability. On the detection/CV side: added a new classifier and a detection model (0.8f), built a thermal pipeline with S3 staging, frame limits, and thermal-direct detection, added thermal mode, thermal bbox debug logging, thermal coordinate offset fixes (with a revert cycle), post-processing filters (horizon crop, aspect ratio, no-overlap), and an inverted thermal filter. Tracker invalidation was enhanced with distance-dependent logic, passed/failed window logging, and attack reset on thermal filter detection. OSD improvements included informative azimuth OSD and a general vartovyi informative OSD. Battery usage prediction was added. On the pendrive/deployment side: godot hash save/check, obfuscate toggle, pendrive build field reduction, picamera restart on capture timeout, preserving godot files on copy failure, and greeter replacement with a wallpaper-based lightdm-gtk-greeter. Security work included JWT-based authorization for ground station private key retrieval. Metrics sync and FPS tracker log fixes round out the period.
summaries.login:danylo-tomashy: Concentrated on sine/positioning reliability, smart flight modes, and Godot UI integration. Sine-related work included glitch detection, a fix for a startup sine bug, fallback to dead reckoning when sine is unavailable during descent, approximate position calculation on descent without sine, and returning to position-hold on glitch. Smart mode was introduced for takeoff (limited to flights above 10 m). RAM refresh after influx was implemented. Azimuth service control was added as a new plugin (orients-mp-plugin). Godot UI work included overlaying the thermal filter and adding thermal/RGB camera switching via stick. A video writer close-on-disable fix and azimuth service control complete the scope.
summaries.login:VolodymyrPavliukevych: Focused on low-level OS/kernel hardening and MAVLink integration. Implemented secure boot via a new kernel (atp-1534), turned off UART debug output and made kernel boot quiet, and landed a MAVLink subscriber approach (atp-1476). Also implemented disabling wireless devices on the platform (atp-1593).
summaries.login:andrii-yefimov: Single infrastructure change — updated task-definition.json, indicating work on deployment or container task configuration.
summaries.login:daniltomashi: Initial repository setup and documentation work: an initial commit, renaming the main document to README, and adding a camera capabilities explanation that specifies using temperature as an exact value.
summaries.login:lzaiatsoai: Single contribution — a radio horizon feature (Feat/radio horizon) in the orients-mission-center repo.
